name: Appointments: Book

description.en: Book a confirmed appointment slot for the current agent.
description.de: Bucht einen bestaetigten Termin fuer den aktuellen Agenten.

bot: Use this only after running appointment-availability and the user has explicitly chosen a slot from the results. Never substitute this with direct calendar event creation — that skips booking policy, overlap checks, and attendee tracking. Always have the attendee name before invoking. Build a descriptive title combining purpose and name (e.g. 'Consultation with Anna Schmidt'). Pass exact start and end times from the chosen slot.

inputs.name: Appointment Title

description.en: Descriptive title shown on the calendar event

inputs.bot: Required. A descriptive title that identifies the appointment at a glance. Always combine the meeting purpose AND the attendee name, e.g. 'Consultation with Anna Schmidt', 'Demo call with Acme Corp', 'Tax review with John Doe'. Never use generic titles like 'Appointment' or 'Meeting'.

inputs.name: Scheduled At

description.en: Exact appointment start in ISO format

inputs.bot: Exact confirmed appointment start in ISO 8601 format.

inputs.name: Timezone
inputs.bot: Timezone identifier like Europe/Vienna, America/New_York, or UTC.

inputs.name: Service Slug

description.de: Optionaler Bezeichner fuer einen konfigurierten Service

inputs.bot: If the booking belongs to a configured service, pass the same service slug used for availability.

inputs.name: Routed Agent UUID

description.en: Optional staff agent UUID for routed bookings
description.de: Optionale UUID des Mitarbeiter-Agenten fuer geroutete Buchungen

inputs.bot: If appointment availability returned a specific agentUuid for the selected slot, pass it here unchanged.

inputs.name: Appointment Request ID
inputs.bot: If this booking is fulfilling a previously created appointment request, pass that request id.

inputs.name: Attendee Name

description.en: Full name of the person the appointment is for
description.de: Vollständiger Name der Person, für die der Termin ist

inputs.bot: Required. Full name of the main attendee. Always ask the user for this if not already provided — never book an appointment without knowing who it is for.

inputs.name: Attendee Email
inputs.bot: Email address of the main attendee if known.

inputs.name: Notes
inputs.bot: Optional notes, context, or agenda to include with the appointment.

inputs.name: Conference Provider
inputs.bot: Use 'google_meet', 'teams', or 'zoom' only if the user explicitly wants a remote meeting link. Otherwise leave empty.
